[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A small, low-resolution graphic shows a yellow circular face icon with a thumbs-up symbol and a number.

The main subject is the face icon and thumbs-up imagery inside a compact rectangular image with a dark background. The face appears yellow with simple facial features, and the thumbs-up symbol is yellow. A white-outlined bubble-like shape at the lower right contains the number 2 in white text.

The setting appears to be a digital UI-style graphic on a dark background, likely part of a chat or reaction interface, though the exact context is unclear.

The colors are mainly yellow, white, and dark gray or black. The lighting is flat and screen-like, with no physical textures visible. The composition is tightly cropped, with the face on the left and the thumbs-up and number on the right.

No important visible text detected.

This image shows a reaction-style icon: a yellow face with a thumbs-up and a small counter reading 2. It appears to be a compact on-screen graphic against a dark background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
